problem_statement: Drew running Claude Code in isolation. Interested in multi-agent setup. Concern: giving Claude access to confidential email/Google data (compliance/trust barrier).

engagement_tracks.name: NanoClaw Demo
engagement_tracks.description: Show container isolation, mount controls, permission boundaries. API via console app + Google MCP as compliance-friendly angle.

objections: Drew 'doesn't trust it' — needs to see control layer
open_questions: Drew's background and role at Alloy
